RuleSet.Name: src/SchemaJavaFXTableViewEditPane.java
RuleSet.Descr: Java 11 JavaFX View/Edit Pane for Table
RuleSet.GenRule: $reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable HasEltTabsATab$$iterate Relation( each HasEltTabsATab empty empty )$
$switch RelationTypeTag Lookup empty Children yes Components yes Details yes Parent empty Container empty Owner empty Master empty default empty$
